articles.title: Chris Mason: Emphatic win leaves Starmer and Labour MPs with big decision
articles.description: The PM will see the stonking scale of Andy Burnham's victory - will it shift his outlook, his defiance, so frequently recently expressed?

articles.title: Scottish Conservatives win first Westminster by-election in more than 50 years
